TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == tatangahan == "nitadasan nu babalaki a lala' " : RayPengśēīÁźÜ:ŚĹ≠ÁĎěÁ•• santi paui' uyza nu hulic ku misumad tu tuluay ni dulitan, "nitadasan nu babalaki a lala' " nalaculan mahula' tu ku lekec. paulicay tusa bataan izaw ku walu ademiad maawas tu kuni sumadan tuluay ni sutitan, "nu buyu' a lala' a hulic", saka tulu bataan izaw ku pitu a sulit, masipu tuni panutekan nu ayzaay ni palekalan tu limaay a mihecaan palalid sa a maluk hawsa amakelec kuni piala tu tantuwa, mahiniay a kamu hawsa, yincumin miala tunu tuas nisubelidan alala', acacay tu patengan, tu situngnas a lala', tungus tuni kalukan atu tungus mluk pahabayay madem ku limaay a mihecaan hawsa, kya taneng maala ku tantuwa. nauyaan a sulitan tu"nu buyu' a lala' "hananay, pazumanen tu "nitadasan nu babalaki a lala' ", ayza nu buyu' a lala' paui' uyza misaulic saka tulu izaw ku pitu tu pilekec, i lalabi liwliw nu buyu' a lala', tu binacadan a lala', pasubaa' tu yincumin patadasen kya a maala ku tungus sakaluk, tungua a lala' atu tungus micaliway tu lala'. uzuma satu tungus tu sakalu, tungusay tu lala' palalid maluk madem ku lima a mihcaan hawsa, nai' ku aca pabeli hantu, nauyzaan ni panukekan nu Cenhu kuw uyzaan tu, anu milimad sa u yincum dada', u zuma patada mikuwanay, u satalakaway ku patengay. mincintang liwiy ci Cening sakamu sa, ayza a demiad sa u yincumin "panukasen ku lala'kaku" cacay nisulitan tu sapilaylay tu laylay, iayaw yincumin miala tu nu yincuminay a lala', a kanca makelec' tu cacay a mihcaan, kya kapah miala tu tatuwa, wini mahapinang izaw kini "misawacu tu binacadan, misakinih tu binacadan" a lekec. Cening liwi micunus saheci sa,ayzaay alekec, "nitadasan nu babalaki a lala' " misinsisi tu ni paliwan a lala', kanca namakay i 1988 a mihecaan, tusa bulad cacay a demiad, namikaluk katukuh ayza cay pialesntuya lala', kya tatungus ku ni sulit a kawaw, sananay a kamu,anu lalid makaluk tabesiw tu tulu bataan a mihcaan hawsa,kya kapah makaawas tuni nitadasan ami sinsiy nu "nitadasan nu babalaki a lala' "
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan == "nitadasan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° " : *ajp…ôŇč**:*** santi paui Ē~ ° ujza nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ku misumad tu tur~…ĺuaj ni dur~…ĺitan, "nitadasan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° " nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan mańßur~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu ku r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶. paur~…ĺi ¶aj tusa bataan izaw ku war~…ĺu ad…ômiad maawas tu kuni sumadan tur~…ĺuaj ni sutitan, "nu buju Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a ńßur~…ĺi ¶", saka tur~…ĺu bataan izaw ku pitu a sur~…ĺit, masipu tuni panut…ôkan nu ajzaaj ni par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß…ô ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺid sa a mar~…ĺuk ńßawsa amak…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ kuni piar~…ĺa tu tantuwa, mańßiniaj a kamu ńßawsa, jin ¶umin miar~…ĺa tunu tuas nisub…ôr~…ĺidan ar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, a ¶a ¶aj tu pat…ôŇčan, tu situŇčnas a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, tuŇčus tuni kar~…ĺukan atu tuŇčus mr~…ĺuk pańßabajaj mad…ôm ku r~…ĺimaaj a mińß…ô ¶aan ńßawsa, kja tan…ôŇč maar~…ĺa ku tantuwa. naujaan a sur~…ĺitan tu"nu buju Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° "ńßananaj, pazuman…ôn tu "nitadasan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ", ajza nu buju Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° paui Ē~ ° ujza misaur~…ĺi ¶ saka tur~…ĺu izaw ku pitu tu pir~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶, i r~…ĺar~…ĺabi r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu buju Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, tu bina ¶adan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, pasubaa Ē~ ° tu jin ¶umin patadas…ôn kja a maar~…ĺa ku tuŇčus sakar~…ĺuk, tuŇčua a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu tuŇčus mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. uzuma satu tuŇčus tu sakar~…ĺu, tuŇčusaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° par~…ĺar~…ĺid mar~…ĺuk mad…ôm ku r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, nai Ē~ ° ku a ¶a pab…ôr~…ĺi ńßantu, naujzaan ni panuk…ôkan nu ¶…ônńßu kuw ujzaan tu, anu mir~…ĺimad sa u jin ¶um dada Ē~ °, u zuma patada mikuwanaj, u satar~…ĺakawaj ku pat…ôŇčaj. min ¶intaŇč r~…ĺiwij ¶i ¶…ôniŇč sakamu sa, ajza a d…ômiad sa u jin ¶umin "panukas…ôn ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °kaku" ¶a ¶aj nisur~…ĺitan tu sapir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, iajaw jin ¶umin miar~…ĺa tu nu jin ¶uminaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, a kan ¶a mak…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan, kja kapańß miar~…ĺa tu tatuwa, wini mańßapinaŇč izaw kini "misawa ¶u tu bina ¶adan, misakinińß tu bina ¶adan" a r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶. ¶…ôniŇč r~…ĺiwi mi ¶unus sańß…ô ¶i sa,ajzaaj ar~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶, "nitadasan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° " misinsisi tu ni par~…ĺiwan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, kan ¶a namakaj i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan, tusa bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, namikar~…ĺuk katukuńß ajza ¶aj piar~…ĺ…ôsntuja r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, kja tatuŇčus ku ni sur~…ĺit a kawaw, sananaj a kamu,anu r~…ĺar~…ĺid makar~…ĺuk tab…ôsiw tu tur~…ĺu bataan a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa,kja kapańß makaawas tuni nitadasan ami sinsij nu "nitadasan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° "
S.FORM: == tatangahan == "nitadasan nu babalaki a lala' " : RayPengśēīÁźÜ:ŚĹ≠ÁĎěÁ•• santi paui' uyza nu hulic ku misumad tu tuluay ni dulitan, "nitadasan nu babalaki a lala' " nalaculan mahula' tu ku lekec. paulicay tusa bataan izaw ku walu ademiad maawas tu kuni sumadan tuluay ni sutitan, "nu buyu' a lala' a hulic", saka tulu bataan izaw ku pitu a sulit, masipu tuni panutekan nu ayzaay ni palekalan tu limaay a mihecaan palalid sa a maluk hawsa amakelec kuni piala tu tantuwa, mahiniay a kamu hawsa, yincumin miala tunu tuas nisubelidan alala', acacay tu patengan, tu situngnas a lala', tungus tuni kalukan atu tungus mluk pahabayay madem ku limaay a mihecaan hawsa, kya taneng maala ku tantuwa. nauyaan a sulitan tu"nu buyu' a lala' "hananay, pazumanen tu "nitadasan nu babalaki a lala' ", ayza nu buyu' a lala' paui' uyza misaulic saka tulu izaw ku pitu tu pilekec, i lalabi liwliw nu buyu' a lala', tu binacadan a lala', pasubaa' tu yincumin patadasen kya a maala ku tungus sakaluk, tungua a lala' atu tungus micaliway tu lala'. uzuma satu tungus tu sakalu, tungusay tu lala' palalid maluk madem ku lima a mihcaan hawsa, nai' ku aca pabeli hantu, nauyzaan ni panukekan nu Cenhu kuw uyzaan tu, anu milimad sa u yincum dada', u zuma patada mikuwanay, u satalakaway ku patengay. mincintang liwiy ci Cening sakamu sa, ayza a demiad sa u yincumin "panukasen ku lala'kaku" cacay nisulitan tu sapilaylay tu laylay, iayaw yincumin miala tu nu yincuminay a lala', a kanca makelec' tu cacay a mihcaan, kya kapah miala tu tatuwa, wini mahapinang izaw kini "misawacu tu binacadan, misakinih tu binacadan" a lekec. Cening liwi micunus saheci sa,ayzaay alekec, "nitadasan nu babalaki a lala' " misinsisi tu ni paliwan a lala', kanca namakay i 1988 a mihecaan, tusa bulad cacay a demiad, namikaluk katukuh ayza cay pialesntuya lala', kya tatungus ku ni sulit a kawaw, sananay a kamu,anu lalid makaluk tabesiw tu tulu bataan a mihcaan hawsa,kya kapah makaawas tuni nitadasan ami sinsiy nu "nitadasan nu babalaki a lala' "
S.PHON: == tataŇčańßan == "nitadasan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° " : *ajp…ôŇč**:*** santi paui Ē~ ° ujza nu ńßur~…ĺi ¶ ku misumad tu tur~…ĺuaj ni dur~…ĺitan, "nitadasan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° " nar~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan mańßur~…ĺa Ē~ ° tu ku r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶. paur~…ĺi ¶aj tusa bataan izaw ku war~…ĺu ad…ômiad maawas tu kuni sumadan tur~…ĺuaj ni sutitan, "nu buju Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° a ńßur~…ĺi ¶", saka tur~…ĺu bataan izaw ku pitu a sur~…ĺit, masipu tuni panut…ôkan nu ajzaaj ni par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan tu r~…ĺimaaj a mińß…ô ¶aan par~…ĺar~…ĺid sa a mar~…ĺuk ńßawsa amak…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ kuni piar~…ĺa tu tantuwa, mańßiniaj a kamu ńßawsa, jin ¶umin miar~…ĺa tunu tuas nisub…ôr~…ĺidan ar~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, a ¶a ¶aj tu pat…ôŇčan, tu situŇčnas a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, tuŇčus tuni kar~…ĺukan atu tuŇčus mr~…ĺuk pańßabajaj mad…ôm ku r~…ĺimaaj a mińß…ô ¶aan ńßawsa, kja tan…ôŇč maar~…ĺa ku tantuwa. naujaan a sur~…ĺitan tu"nu buju Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° "ńßananaj, pazuman…ôn tu "nitadasan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ", ajza nu buju Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° paui Ē~ ° ujza misaur~…ĺi ¶ saka tur~…ĺu izaw ku pitu tu pir~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶, i r~…ĺar~…ĺabi r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu buju Ē~ ° a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, tu bina ¶adan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, pasubaa Ē~ ° tu jin ¶umin patadas…ôn kja a maar~…ĺa ku tuŇčus sakar~…ĺuk, tuŇčua a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° atu tuŇčus mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °. uzuma satu tuŇčus tu sakar~…ĺu, tuŇčusaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° par~…ĺar~…ĺid mar~…ĺuk mad…ôm ku r~…ĺima a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa, nai Ē~ ° ku a ¶a pab…ôr~…ĺi ńßantu, naujzaan ni panuk…ôkan nu ¶…ônńßu kuw ujzaan tu, anu mir~…ĺimad sa u jin ¶um dada Ē~ °, u zuma patada mikuwanaj, u satar~…ĺakawaj ku pat…ôŇčaj. min ¶intaŇč r~…ĺiwij ¶i ¶…ôniŇč sakamu sa, ajza a d…ômiad sa u jin ¶umin "panukas…ôn ku r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °kaku" ¶a ¶aj nisur~…ĺitan tu sapir~…ĺajr~…ĺaj tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj, iajaw jin ¶umin miar~…ĺa tu nu jin ¶uminaj a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, a kan ¶a mak…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶ Ē~ ° tu ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶aan, kja kapańß miar~…ĺa tu tatuwa, wini mańßapinaŇč izaw kini "misawa ¶u tu bina ¶adan, misakinińß tu bina ¶adan" a r~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶. ¶…ôniŇč r~…ĺiwi mi ¶unus sańß…ô ¶i sa,ajzaaj ar~…ĺ…ôk…ô ¶, "nitadasan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° " misinsisi tu ni par~…ĺiwan a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, kan ¶a namakaj i **** a mińß…ô ¶aan, tusa bur~…ĺad ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiad, namikar~…ĺuk katukuńß ajza ¶aj piar~…ĺ…ôsntuja r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ °, kja tatuŇčus ku ni sur~…ĺit a kawaw, sananaj a kamu,anu r~…ĺar~…ĺid makar~…ĺuk tab…ôsiw tu tur~…ĺu bataan a mińß ¶aan ńßawsa,kja kapańß makaawas tuni nitadasan ami sinsij nu "nitadasan nu babar~…ĺaki a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° "
